revision.comment: Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (ja:浅草, en:Asakusa); add local discussion section + dated import note
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/99356722 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 「雷門」の読み仮名について == 浅草寺の「雷門」の読み仮名を「らいもん」から「かみなりもん」に変更しましたが、「らいもん」という読み仮名は根拠がございますか？ いろいろな資料を当っても「かみなりもん」という読みはあっても「らいもん」というのは人名を除いては見つけることが出来ません。--[[利用者:Matsubara-kou|松原　虹]] 2007年4月8日 (日) 09:49 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199062344 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|tokyo=y}} }} {{reqmapin|Japan}} ==Meaning of 浅== The '浅' of 浅草 does not meaning "morning", but (variously) "shallow", "wretched" or "shameful". Unless somebody can sort out the etymology and choose the right one I'll leave this out. [[User:Jpatokal|Jpatokal]] 05:06, 15 Aug 2004 (UTC) (owing to wartime bombing) may be misleading. Less of Tokyo was destroyed than people think. The Japanese themselves, in their zeal to become "modernized," were the ones to tear down so many historical buildings. —Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:134.160.214.32|134.160.214.32]] ([[User talk:134.160.214.32|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/134.160.214.32|contribs]]) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Merging Nakamise-Dori == I've added a template suggesting merging [[Nakamise-Dori]] into [[Asakusa]]. The street is, according to the article, about 250 m long, and the article focuses more on shops and tourism than on transportation. It seems to be a natural to add to the article on Asakusa. [[User:Fg2|Fg2]] ([[User talk:Fg2|talk]]) 22:02, 23 August 2008 (UTC) :I '''support''' this merge suggestion for the reasons given by Fg2. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Japanese|?]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] 02:38, 24 August 2008 (UTC) :It is hard to tell what should be done with the article in its current form. I debated creating it when I first started working on related articles earlier this year ([[Kaminarimon]], [[Hozomon]], [[Sanja Matsuri]], etc.) but ultimately decided against it. I'm not sure how much information about Nakamise-dori is out there and if it is enough to justify a whole article. In its current form however, I would have to support this suggestion. --[[User:Torsodog|Torsodog]][[User talk:Torsodog|Talk]] 07:33, 24 August 2008 (UTC) :I would suggest that it instead be merged into [[Sensō-ji]], as it's more directly related to the temple than to the wider larger area. However, I am not particularly opposed to it being merged into [[Asakusa]]. [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] ([[User talk:LordAmeth|talk]]) 01:22, 25 August 2008 (UTC) ::LordAmeth, that's a good point. I'd also support merging into [[Sensō-ji]]. It doesn't have to be Asakusa. [[User:Fg2|Fg2]] ([[User talk:Fg2|talk]]) 10:16, 26 August 2008 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Asakusa]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=798715915 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20071009223606/http://www.tamborins.com.br/asulti/exibe.php?selec1=asulti&selec2=&selec3=20050826002 to http://www.tamborins.com.br/asulti/exibe.php?selec1=asulti&selec2=&selec3=20050826002 When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 11:19, 3 September 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Look Japan article on Asakusa == https://web.archive.org/web/20020629070449/http://www.lookjapan.com/LBsc/02JuneWT.htm [[User:WhisperToMe|WhisperToMe]] ([[User talk:WhisperToMe|talk]]) 12:09, 1 May 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

{{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/99356722 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 「雷門」の読み仮名について == 浅草寺の「雷門」の読み仮名を「らいもん」から「かみなりもん」に変更しましたが、「らいもん」という読み仮名は根拠がございますか？ いろいろな資料を当っても「かみなりもん」という読みはあっても「らいもん」というのは人名を除いては見つけることが出来ません。--[[User:Matsubara-kou|松原　虹]] 2007年4月8日 (日) 09:49 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199062344 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|tokyo=y}} }} {{reqmapin|Japan}} ==Meaning of 浅== The '浅' of 浅草 does not meaning "morning", but (variously) "shallow", "wretched" or "shameful". Unless somebody can sort out the etymology and choose the right one I'll leave this out. [[User:Jpatokal|Jpatokal]] 05:06, 15 Aug 2004 (UTC) (owing to wartime bombing) may be misleading. Less of Tokyo was destroyed than people think. The Japanese themselves, in their zeal to become "modernized," were the ones to tear down so many historical buildings. —Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:134.160.214.32|134.160.214.32]] ([[User talk:134.160.214.32|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/134.160.214.32|contribs]]) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Merging Nakamise-Dori == I've added a template suggesting merging [[Nakamise-Dori]] into [[Asakusa]]. The street is, according to the article, about 250 m long, and the article focuses more on shops and tourism than on transportation. It seems to be a natural to add to the article on Asakusa. [[User:Fg2|Fg2]] ([[User talk:Fg2|talk]]) 22:02, 23 August 2008 (UTC) :I '''support''' this merge suggestion for the reasons given by Fg2. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Japanese|?]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] 02:38, 24 August 2008 (UTC) :It is hard to tell what should be done with the article in its current form. I debated creating it when I first started working on related articles earlier this year ([[Kaminarimon]], [[Hozomon]], [[Sanja Matsuri]], etc.) but ultimately decided against it. I'm not sure how much information about Nakamise-dori is out there and if it is enough to justify a whole article. In its current form however, I would have to support this suggestion. --[[User:Torsodog|Torsodog]][[User talk:Torsodog|Talk]] 07:33, 24 August 2008 (UTC) :I would suggest that it instead be merged into [[Sensō-ji]], as it's more directly related to the temple than to the wider larger area. However, I am not particularly opposed to it being merged into [[Asakusa]]. [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] ([[User talk:LordAmeth|talk]]) 01:22, 25 August 2008 (UTC) ::LordAmeth, that's a good point. I'd also support merging into [[Sensō-ji]]. It doesn't have to be Asakusa. [[User:Fg2|Fg2]] ([[User talk:Fg2|talk]]) 10:16, 26 August 2008 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Asakusa]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=798715915 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20071009223606/http://www.tamborins.com.br/asulti/exibe.php?selec1=asulti&selec2=&selec3=20050826002 to http://www.tamborins.com.br/asulti/exibe.php?selec1=asulti&selec2=&selec3=20050826002 When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 11:19, 3 September 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Look Japan article on Asakusa == https://web.archive.org/web/20020629070449/http://www.lookjapan.com/LBsc/02JuneWT.htm [[User:WhisperToMe|WhisperToMe]] ([[User talk:WhisperToMe|talk]]) 12:09, 1 May 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC)

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] previous contributors were [[User:en>RodRabelo7]], [[User:Immanuelle]], [[User:EmmaBot]], see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Asakusa here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{talk page header}} == Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from Japanese Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://ja.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/99356722 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == 「雷門」の読み仮名について == 浅草寺の「雷門」の読み仮名を「らいもん」から「かみなりもん」に変更しましたが、「らいもん」という読み仮名は根拠がございますか？ いろいろな資料を当っても「かみなりもん」という読みはあっても「らいもん」というのは人名を除いては見つけることが出来ません。--[[User:Matsubara-kou|松原　虹]] 2007年4月8日 (日) 09:49 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Imported from English Wikipedia (2026-02-26, [https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Special:PermanentLink/1199062344 revision]) == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) {{WikiProject banner shell|class=Start| {{WikiProject Japan|importance=high|tokyo=y}} }} {{reqmapin|Japan}} ==Meaning of 浅== The '浅' of 浅草 does not meaning "morning", but (variously) "shallow", "wretched" or "shameful". Unless somebody can sort out the etymology and choose the right one I'll leave this out. [[User:Jpatokal|Jpatokal]] 05:06, 15 Aug 2004 (UTC) (owing to wartime bombing) may be misleading. Less of Tokyo was destroyed than people think. The Japanese themselves, in their zeal to become "modernized," were the ones to tear down so many historical buildings. —Preceding [[Wikipedia:Signatures|unsigned]] comment added by [[User:134.160.214.32|134.160.214.32]] ([[User talk:134.160.214.32|talk]] • [[Special:Contributions/134.160.214.32|contribs]]) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Merging Nakamise-Dori == I've added a template suggesting merging [[Nakamise-Dori]] into [[Asakusa]]. The street is, according to the article, about 250 m long, and the article focuses more on shops and tourism than on transportation. It seems to be a natural to add to the article on Asakusa. [[User:Fg2|Fg2]] ([[User talk:Fg2|talk]]) 22:02, 23 August 2008 (UTC) :I '''support''' this merge suggestion for the reasons given by Fg2. ···[[User:Nihonjoe|日本穣]][[Help:Japanese|?]] · [[User talk:Nihonjoe|Talk to Nihonjoe]] 02:38, 24 August 2008 (UTC) :It is hard to tell what should be done with the article in its current form. I debated creating it when I first started working on related articles earlier this year ([[Kaminarimon]], [[Hozomon]], [[Sanja Matsuri]], etc.) but ultimately decided against it. I'm not sure how much information about Nakamise-dori is out there and if it is enough to justify a whole article. In its current form however, I would have to support this suggestion. --[[User:Torsodog|Torsodog]][[User talk:Torsodog|Talk]] 07:33, 24 August 2008 (UTC) :I would suggest that it instead be merged into [[Sensō-ji]], as it's more directly related to the temple than to the wider larger area. However, I am not particularly opposed to it being merged into [[Asakusa]]. [[User:LordAmeth|LordAmeth]] ([[User talk:LordAmeth|talk]]) 01:22, 25 August 2008 (UTC) ::LordAmeth, that's a good point. I'd also support merging into [[Sensō-ji]]. It doesn't have to be Asakusa. [[User:Fg2|Fg2]] ([[User talk:Fg2|talk]]) 10:16, 26 August 2008 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == External links modified == Hello fellow Wikipedians, I have just modified one external link on [[Asakusa]]. Please take a moment to review [https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?diff=prev&oldid=798715915 my edit]. If you have any questions, or need the bot to ignore the links, or the page altogether, please visit [[User:Cyberpower678/FaQs#InternetArchiveBot|this simple FaQ]] for additional information. I made the following changes: *Added archive https://web.archive.org/web/20071009223606/http://www.tamborins.com.br/asulti/exibe.php?selec1=asulti&selec2=&selec3=20050826002 to http://www.tamborins.com.br/asulti/exibe.php?selec1=asulti&selec2=&selec3=20050826002 When you have finished reviewing my changes, you may follow the instructions on the template below to fix any issues with the URLs. {{sourcecheck|checked=false|needhelp=}} Cheers.—[[User:InternetArchiveBot|'''InternetArchiveBot''']] ([[User talk:InternetArchiveBot|Report bug]]) 11:19, 3 September 2017 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC) == Look Japan article on Asakusa == https://web.archive.org/web/20020629070449/http://www.lookjapan.com/LBsc/02JuneWT.htm [[User:WhisperToMe|WhisperToMe]] ([[User talk:WhisperToMe|talk]]) 12:09, 1 May 2019 (UTC) :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 01:19, 26 February 2026 (UTC)
